entity.label: Nophah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Blast, a city of Moab which was occupied by the Amorites (Num. 21:30).

nodes.label: Nophah
nodes.description: Blast, a city of Moab which was occupied by the Amorites (Num. 21:30).

verses.text: We have shot at them; Heshbon is perished even unto Dibon, and we have laid them waste even unto Nophah, which reacheth unto Medeba.
